My friend Joe was born ing 1990 whereas his girlfriend was born in 1993. He's faithful to her and would never cheat on her. They dined in a hotel's restaurant which is midway between his house and k-11 shopping mall. He stood in line outside the restaurant for an hour. The line was so huge that it stretched from the counter through the lobby area and out the main entrance of the hotel. A stout man tried to cut in line but was caught lol. By the way I went to their house today. The shuttle bus queue was so big stretching down the road to the furthest mini bus stop. I queued for thirty minutes before three shuttle buses came along at once. Meanwhile, some people mistook this long queue for the queue for other places. A couple asked "are you in the queue for Cluny Park?" to make sure it's the right queue. A stout man pushed in at the head of the queue but people ignored it. Later a slender guy jumped the queue. The lady behind him said "Excuse me. The end of the line is back there." A woman was standing beside a guy who was midway through the queue. While pretending to look at her phone, she edged furtively behind him who didn't realise she was there. Some people might have noticed it but ignored it. Joe sometimes has a snooze at lunchtime because he has so much work to do that he feels drained. He usually snoozes on the sofa or at his desk by the fireplace when everyone else's eating lunch outside. He once brought his work along with him to the library where I saw him doze off at the table. Having a doze especially in front of the fire is a marvelous way to recharge your energy though. His sis has just completed her PhD at Tokyo University and is on the way to becoming a professor. Japan's on the way to becoming the world's strongest economy. Not every man's type of woman is the same. Of course everybody likes handsome and beautiful people. In terms of appearance, some men like petite women, some like sporty women, some like them well-rounded and curvaceous, some like them tall and thin, some like them voluptuous, some like full bust, some like wide hips, some like shapely legs, some like silky feet and so on.
